category_sources: Official SourceForge Motif page describes Motif as released as open source software under LGPL v2.1.
source_facts.description says OpenMotif is the LGPL release of the Motif toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openmotif; package ecosystem and Motif project materials refer to the open Motif distribution as OpenMotif/Open Motif.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge Motif files page includes release README guidance and is the best official documentation surface found for this legacy project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge Motif project provides a source-control browser at /p/motif/code/ci/master/tree/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Motif toolkit; package executables include mwm and uil from the X11 Motif desktop/toolkit stack.
